pi_items.source: SCCT Guidelines for the Interpretation and Reporting of Coronary Computed Tomographic Angiography
SCCT Guidelines for the Interpretation and Reporting of Coronary Computed Tomographic Angiography

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes synthetic data (amos_0001.nii.gz) generated as a fallback for the AMOS 2022 dataset. For CT angiography (CTA) visualization of the aorta, standard clinical guidelines recommend a window width of 800 and a window level of 300.
